text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I was just bemoaning the fact that my<n>very
presence here makes these posters<n>simply
disappear.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You can make posters disappear?!<n>Wowie! How're
you doing that?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why, by standing here, of course! My<n>dazzling
countenance outshines all!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Dazzling? You mean light makes them<n>disappear?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Okie-dokie! Then I'll go grab a flashlight<n>and
help!
